Class Unit

java.lang.Object
cityrescue.Unit
Direct Known Subclasses:
Ambulance, FireEngine, PoliceCar
public abstract class Unit extends Object
Abstract class for each of the different unit types

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    protected Incident
    assignedIncident
    Currently assigned unit, Null if no incident assigned
    protected int
    assignedIncidentId
    Unique ID of assigned incident
    protected int
    homeStationId
    Unique ID of the home station
    protected int
    homeStationX
    X position of the home station
    protected int
    homeStationY
    Y position of the home station
    protected int
    incidentX
    X position of assigned incident
    protected int
    incidentY
    Y position of assigned indident

    status
    Current status of the unit

    type
    UnitType of the desired unit
    protected final int

    protected int
    workremaining
    Number of ticks of work left
    protected int

    Current x position of unit
    protected int

    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
    protected
    Unit(int id, UnitType type, int x, int y, int homeStationId, int homeStationX, int homeStationY)

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    assign(Incident incident)
    Assigns the unit to the passed in Incident
    abstract boolean
    canHandle(IncidentType type)
     
    protected int
    getDistanceFrom(int x, int y)
    Function used to return the distance of this unit from the passed in coordinate
    protected int
    getDistanceFrom(int x1, int y1, int x2, int y2)
    Function used to return the distance between two points
    int
    getId()
    Returns the ID of this Unit
    abstract int
    getTicksToResolve(int severity)
     
    protected UnitStatus
    returnStatus()
    Returns the current Status of the unit
    protected void
    setStationId(int newId)
    Updates home station ID to passed ID
    protected void
    setStatus(UnitStatus status)
    Updates the unit status to passed status
    void
    Tick(boolean[][] blocked)
    Function that is run each tick to decide what the unit does that tick If Unit is IDLE, then nothing happens IF Unit is EN_ROUTE, then the unit is moved to the first legal move IF Unit is ATSCENE, Then the units work remaining is reduced until 0
    protected void
    unassign()
    Unassigns the unit and sets status to IDLE
    protected String
    viewUnit()
    Returns a String representation of the Unit at that current tick

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

      Current status of the unit

      Currently assigned unit, Null if no incident assigned

      X position of assigned incident

      Number of ticks of work left

  • Constructor Details

    • Unit

      protected Unit(int id, UnitType type, int x, int y, int homeStationId, int homeStationX, int homeStationY)
      Constructor of the Abstract Unit class
      Parameters:
      id - The unique ID given to the unit
      type - The given UnitType of the unit
      x - The current x position of the unit
      y - the current y position of the unit
      homeStationId - the ID of the home station
      homeStationX - the x position of the home station
      homeStationY - the y position of the home station

  • Method Details

    • canHandle

      public abstract boolean canHandle(IncidentType type)

    • getTicksToResolve

      public abstract int getTicksToResolve(int severity)

    • Tick

      public void Tick(boolean[][] blocked)
      Function that is run each tick to decide what the unit does that tick If Unit is IDLE, then nothing happens IF Unit is EN_ROUTE, then the unit is moved to the first legal move IF Unit is ATSCENE, Then the units work remaining is reduced until 0
      Parameters:
      blocked - Blocked grid for checking if the move is legal

    • getDistanceFrom

      protected int getDistanceFrom(int x, int y)
      Function used to return the distance of this unit from the passed in coordinate
      Parameters:
      x - Target x coordinate
      y - Target y coordinate
      Returns:
      int The calculated Distance

    • getDistanceFrom

      protected int getDistanceFrom(int x1, int y1, int x2, int y2)
      Function used to return the distance between two points
      Parameters:
      x1 - Source x position
      y1 - Source y position
      x2 - Target x position
      y2 - Target y position
      Returns:
      int The calculated Distance

    • viewUnit

      protected String viewUnit()
      Returns a String representation of the Unit at that current tick
      Returns:
      String, returns one large string of the unit status.

    • assign

      public void assign(Incident incident)
      Assigns the unit to the passed in Incident
      Parameters:
      incident -

    • unassign

      protected void unassign()
      Unassigns the unit and sets status to IDLE

    • returnStatus

      protected UnitStatus returnStatus()
      Returns the current Status of the unit
      Returns:
      UnitStatus current status

    • setStationId

      protected void setStationId(int newId)
      Updates home station ID to passed ID
      Parameters:
      newId - ID of new station

    • setStatus

      protected void setStatus(UnitStatus status)
      Updates the unit status to passed status
      Parameters:
      status - New status

    • getId

      public int getId()
      Returns the ID of this Unit
